ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Across shoulder measurement range for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range for the size */,
  "arm_hole" TEXT /* Arm hole measurement range for the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region this size chart applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name/description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to link to the product's category */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used in the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "color_options" TEXT /* Available color options for the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region this category applies to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the category (e.g., Men, Women, Children) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size from the size chart */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this size available in stock */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the specific size */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage for the specific size */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the size was added to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item is part of */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-size combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Default shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Default billing address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
